title: Attune Template Frontmatter
description: Schema for the YAML frontmatter block of an Attune template. Unknown keys are preserved verbatim (additionalProperties: true) so new fields can be added without breaking older templates.

type.description: Template kind. Drives retrieval ranking and UI affordances.

tags.description: Free-form classification tags. Drawn from corpus vocabulary via autocomplete.

aliases.description: Alternate names this template can be referred to by. Globally unique across the corpus.

summary.description: 1-3 sentence summary used for retrieval boosting.

hash.description: Semantic hash managed by the staleness/regen pipeline. The editor does not compute this in v1.
